Connecting Brain-Computer Interface Research Across the UK

A national consortium of researchers, clinicians and engineers dedicated to accelerating BCI Research.

Latest News Upcoming Events
About Us

A National Effort to Facilitate collaboration in BCI Research

The UK BCI Community is a grassroots, researcher-led initiative bringing together Brain-Computer Interface researchers across the UK

Despite world-class labs, many of us work in silos with no national ecosystem connecting students, early-career researchers, and academics. Collaboration often only begins at international conferences, and there’s no low-stakes space to share ideas, ask questions, or meet peers across institutions. We’re building that space. Our mission is to create an inclusive, low-pressure community where UK BCI researchers can connect, share their work, discover collaborators, and build a collective identity. Join us as we grow a visible, supportive, and vibrant UK BCI ecosystem.
